title: Water source Sight
description: Highlights the main water source block for faster removal and better PvP control.
body:
# 📦 Water Source Sight

## 🌊 Overview

A lightweight vanilla-friendly Minecraft resource pack that helps players identify the main water source block more clearly during gameplay.

Designed for PvP, SMP, and Survival use while keeping Minecraft’s original style intact.

---
![overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6231101272f68a684da01bdc277210092d513db.png)
---
## ✨ Features

> • Highlights main water source blocks
> • Cleaner water visibility during gameplay
> • Useful for PvP, SMP & Survival
> • Lightweight and simple design
> • Vanilla-friendly appearance

---

## 🎯 Recommended For

> • PvP Players
> • SMP Servers
> • Survival Gameplay
> • Competitive Water Fights

---

## 🧩 Resolution

> **16x Default Minecraft Resolution**

---

## 🛠 Compatibility

> **Minecraft 1.19+ / 1.20+ / 1.21+**

---

## 📜 Asset Ownership

All assets and modifications in **Water Source Sight** were created by me.
No textures or assets were copied or extracted from other resource packs.

---

### 👤 Creator

> by **GAMER_TIGE99**

#Minecraft #ResourcePack #PvP #SMP #VanillaFriendly #WaterSourceSight
